channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Excess Rubbish next to bin, 19th April
item.description:
Strewn all over the grass nearby. What 3 words location is ROTATE.PERKY.BEAM

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Danson Lane, Welling, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bird poo, 19th April
item.description:
A lot of bird poo in this part of the pavement

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Palace View, Widmore, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Footpath is blocked, residential access is blocked, 19th April
item.description:
Many pallets of products have been left on the footpath. It has been present for 48 hours so far (as at midday 19th April)

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Hackney Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lordship Lane, Dulwich, Greater London

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Parish Lane, Penge, Greater London

item.title: Significant fly tipping, 19th April
item.description:

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Culverley Road, Catford South, Greater London

item.title: Litter problem, 19th April
item.description:
There is lots of litter on the pavements and grass verges on Aldersmead Road, from the junction with Kings Hall Rd up to the Cator Park entrance. Food wrappers etc. Please can it get a clean-up?

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Aldersmead Road, New Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flyposting, 19th April
item.description:
Flyposting

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lordship Lane, Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Nitrous oxide canister, 19th April
item.description:
There's a dark-coloured nitrous oxide canister at the bottom of the hedge next to the park, other side of the street from 21 Aldersmead rd
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Aldersmead Road, New Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Mattress left outside, 19th April
item.description:
Mattress left outside 111 brook drive

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 106, Brook Drive, Elephant and Castle, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned vehicle blocking bus stop and Trafalgar Rd, 19th April
item.description:
This vehicle was first reported in 3rd April from what I can see and is still there today 19th April. It has now been clamped and is covered in parking tickets. It is blocking a busy main road and a busy bus stop. Why has it not been removed?

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Trafalgar Road, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.description:
Opposite National Terrace/top of Edward III grass

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bermondsey Wall East, Bermondsey, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Illegal parking, 19th April

item.title: In the back of communal garden behind 19 Belsize Avenue., 19th April
item.description:
Access to this tree is opened from the street. There is a little alleyway which is opened. The back of the building is a communal area. Branches are very low and hanging into our garden at number 21 Belsize Avenue. Thank you
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 9-16, Belsize Lane, Belsize Park, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
